differential_diagnoses: Drug-induced liver injury and systemic reaction to dabrafenib-trametinib
next_steps: PCR for Anaplasma phagocytophilum and Ehrlichia chaffeensis
Peripheral blood smear review for morulae in neutrophils
Serum ferritin, triglyceride, fibrinogen, and LDH levels to screen for HLH
Morning serum cortisol and ACTH levels
Hold all hepatotoxic medications including NSAIDs
Magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) to evaluate rising alkaline phosphatase
